architecture:

  (input_proj): Sequential(
    (0): Linear(in_features=1, out_features=432, bias=True)

    (attn): MultiheadAttention(

    (res): ResidualForecastHead(
      (block): Sequential(

        (2): Dropout(p=0.2108684274364102, inplace=False)

      )
      (norm): LayerNorm((432,), eps=1e-05, elementwise_affine=True)
    )
    (out): Linear(in_features=432, out_features=1, bias=True)
  )
  (sigma_decoder): HorizonConditionedHead(
    (attn): MultiheadAttention(
      (out_proj): NonDynamicallyQuantizableLinear(in_features=432, out_features=432, bias=True)
    )
    (norm): LayerNorm((432,), eps=1e-05, elementwise_affine=True)

        (1): GELU(approximate='none')

      )
      (norm): LayerNorm((432,), eps=1e-05, elementwise_affine=True)
    )
    (out): Linear(in_features=432, out_features=1, bias=True)
  )
  (softplus): Softplus(beta=1.0, threshold=20.0)
)
